Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "WEAVER-1100" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Weaver.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Removed the calls to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $1C8F and the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $1C9F to remove disk access from the game (for high score loading and saving).
The default highscore data which was originally loaded from disk has been placed at $C700 in the dump. Furthermore, the JSR $1C26 instruction at $1112 has been NOP'd out to remove the call to the routine which zeroes out the high score table on startup.
